description_long: This is a large, upscale residential house set within a landscaped lot featuring numerous mature trees and manicured hedges. The house has a dark, steeply pitched roof with dormer windows and a symmetrical facade, accented by a prominent front entryway with steps and a small porch. The rear of the property includes a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, paved patio, and additional greenery. The house is surrounded by a driveway and walkways, with a row of trees lining the street-facing side. Windows are arranged in balanced rows, and the exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the dark roof. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and modern architectural elements, with a focus on comfort and curb appeal.
description: A large, elegant house with a dark pitched roof, symmetrical windows, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical facade, and tree-lined street.
description_view_1: Side/rear angle highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, and extensive landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, patio, and back elevation with large windows.
description_view_3: Side/front angle showing the driveway, side yard, and partial view of the entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, small porch, and flanking columns, accented by landscaping and a paved walkway.
